---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest an improvement or new feature
title: "[Feature] "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? What's the motivation?

## Proposed Solution

A clear description of what you'd like to happen.

## Alternatives Considered

What other approaches did you consider, and why did you rule them out?

## Additional Context

Any other context, references, or examples that might help.
